questions: How do I start writing a novel?
What are the elements of fiction?
answers: Fiction writing is the creation of imaginary stories, including novels, short stories, and novellas, built from characters, plots, and settings that come from the author's imagination.
Fiction writing holo kalponik golpo lekha — novel, short story, ba novella — ja lekhok er imagination theke ashe.
To start a novel, outline your main characters and plot, set a daily word count goal, and just begin writing without worrying about perfection in the first draft.
The key elements of fiction are character, plot, setting, conflict, theme, and point of view. Mastering these makes your stories compelling and believable.
